_comment: audio-theater dialogue for the character lip-sync lines. Use ONLY when you need a specific non-MiniMax voice (e.g. youthful/character voices). One entry per spoken line; generate the audio, then lip-sync each onto its character face with avatar-talking-video --audio, and reference the resulting clip in plan.json (kind 'audio') + storyboard (guest scene).
title: <episodio> - dialogos
